hermes-agent.description: Shared Python runtime each enrolled user agent runs. The single Hermes venv at state/runtime/hermes-venv/ is built from this exact commit; every per-user hermes-home points at it via PATH + HERMES_HOME.

hermes-docs.description: Hermes user docs are synced into the vault, defaulting to Agents_KB/hermes-agent-docs/ as agent operating knowledge. Defaults to the same ref as hermes-agent so docs and runtime can't drift; override only when intentionally previewing newer docs or using a different vault layout.

nvm.description: Node Version Manager installer. Pinned tag is fetched from raw.githubusercontent.com and piped to bash during userland bootstrap.

node.description: Node.js runtime managed by nvm. Currently a major-only pin; nvm picks the latest patch within v22.x at install time.

python.description: Python interpreter for the shared Hermes venv. Resolved via uv python install; falls back through preferred[] in order, then to system python3 (>= minimum).

qmd.description: qmd retrieval CLI + MCP server. Explicit semver pin keeps recall/index semantics stable across host bootstraps and upgrades.

nextcloud.description: Nextcloud web UI for browsing the shared vault and uploading PDFs. Tag floats within 31.x to receive minor + security patches.

uv.description: Python package + venv manager. Currently floats on the astral.sh install script; Phase 3 will pin via UV_VERSION env.

tailscale.description: Tailscale VPN. Floating on the official install script is acceptable here because Tailscale's package channel is the authoritative source of truth and the OS package manager handles upgrades.

quarto.description: Quarto static-site renderer. Optional + externally installed; the deploy does not bootstrap quarto. If present, render-quarto.sh uses whatever version is on PATH.
